creator: emaste@freebsd.org
text:
> News to me, too. We could print that? Something like:
>
>  printf("symbol %s (try -l%s%s)", name, starts_with_lib? "" : ":", libname)

That seems like a decent idea.  We want to make sure it both starts with "lib" and ends with ".so" though I think.  It will also avoid needing two separate strings in the .pot file too.
